vineyards.name: Bodegas Vega Sicilia
vineyards.address: Carretera N-122, km 323, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits strictly by appointment; contact the estate directly.
vineyards.description: The Ribera del Duero estate founded in 1864, producing Unico after a minimum of ten years' ageing and the Valbuena 5 degree as an earlier-release sibling.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Alión
vineyards.address: Carretera Peñafiel-Encinas, km 2, 47316 Padilla de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment through the Vega Sicilia group.
vineyards.description: The second estate of the Vega Sicilia group, founded in 1991, producing a 100% Tinto Fino wine aged in French oak with a modern, approachable style relative to its famous sibling Unico.

vineyards.name: Dominio de Pingus
vineyards.address: La Horra, 09311 La Horra, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: Peter Sisseck's cult estate in La Horra, producing Pingus from a single old-vine parcel and the more accessible Flor de Pingus and PSI from older purchased fruit across the appellation.

vineyards.name: Tinto Pesquera
vineyards.address: Calle Real 2, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings by prior arrangement at the estate.
vineyards.description: Alejandro Fernandez's estate that brought global attention to Ribera del Duero in the 1980s, producing Tinto Pesquera Crianza, Reserva, Gran Reserva and the prestige Janus label from old Tinto Fino vines.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Aalto
vineyards.address: Paraje Vallejo de Carril s/n, 47360 Quintanilla de Arriba, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: Founded in 1999 at Quintanilla de Arriba by former Vega Sicilia winemaker Mariano García and Javier Zaccagnini, producing single-vineyard PS and the Aalto flagship from old Tinto Fino vines.

verified.address_quoted: Paraje Vallejo de Carril s/n, Quintanilla de Arriba, Valladolid 47360

vineyards.name: Bodegas Mauro
vineyards.address: Carretera de Villabañez km 1, 47320 Tudela del Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: Founded in 1980 by Mariano García at Tudela del Duero, producing the Mauro, Mauro VS and Terreus cuvées as VT Castilla y Leon because some vineyards fall outside the DO boundary, with 90 hectares under vine averaging 35 years.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera de Villabáñez, Km 1, 47320 Tudela del Duero (Valladolid)

vineyards.name: Dominio del Águila
vineyards.address: La Aguilera, 09317 La Aguilera, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: Jorge Monzón's certified-organic estate at La Aguilera producing Pícaro del Águila rosé, Dominio del Águila and single-parcel Peñas Aladas from pre-phylloxera old vines.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Emilio Moro
vineyards.address: Carretera Peñafiel-Valoria s/n, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tourism with visits, tastings, restaurant and wine bar on site.
vineyards.description: A four-generation family estate at Pesquera de Duero founded commercially in 1987, producing the Emilio Moro Crianza, the Malleolus range and single-vineyard Malleolus de Valderramiro and Malleolus de Sanchomartín.
vineyards.tip: Book the on-site restaurant El Rincón de Emilio for local roast lamb after the cellar tour.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Peñafiel-Valoria, S/N, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid

vineyards.name: Bodegas Protos
vineyards.address: C/ Bodegas Protos 24-28, 47300 Peñafiel, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: The most-visited winery in Ribera del Duero, with guided tours open to the public since 2009; book via enoturismo@bodegasprotos.com or +34 659 843 463.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1927 as a cooperative under Peñafiel Castle, Protos is the historic anchor of the appellation and the region's most-visited winery, housed in a spectacular Richard Rogers-designed cellar opened in 2008.
vineyards.tip: Combine the cellar tour with a visit to the castle-top Museo Provincial del Vino above.

vineyards.name: Pago de Carraovejas
vineyards.address: Camino Carraovejas s/n, 47316 Peñafiel, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tourism and cellar visits by appointment; on-site Ambivium restaurant holds a Michelin star.
vineyards.description: A landmark estate near Peñafiel famous for its Pago de Carraovejas Crianza and Reserva and the single-vineyard El Anejon, with the Michelin-starred Ambivium restaurant drawing visitors from across Castile.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Arzuaga Navarro
vineyards.address: Carretera N-122, km 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onésimo, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Full wine tourism complex with tastings, hotel, spa and on-site restaurant.
vineyards.description: A family estate and hospitality complex at Quintanilla de Onesimo, producing the Arzuaga Crianza, Reserva, Gran Arzuaga and single-vineyard Fan d'Or, with a hotel and spa on the vineyard.

vineyards.name: Hacienda Monasterio
vineyards.address: Carretera Peñafiel-Pesquera km 4, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A classic estate near Pesquera de Duero founded in 1991, with veteran consultant winemaker Peter Sisseck shaping the Hacienda Monasterio and Reserva Especial from a diverse five-variety blend.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Félix Callejo
vineyards.address: Avenida del Cid km 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A certified organic estate at Sotillo de la Ribera in Burgos province, where José Félix and daughter Noelia craft village-and single-vineyard Tinto Fino wines from high-altitude limestone soils at 830 to 930 metres.

verified.address_quoted: Avenida del Cid, Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Spain

vineyards.name: Bodegas Hermanos Sastre
vineyards.address: Camino de la Rábida s/n, 09311 La Horra, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A La Horra estate founded by the Sastre brothers in 1992, producing the Roble, Crianza, Viña Sastre Reserva and single-parcel Pago de Santa Cruz from old Tinto Fino vines in the Burgos sector.

vineyards.name: Goyo García Viadero
vineyards.address: Villalbilla de Gumiel, 09314 Villalbilla de Gumiel, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A natural-wine pioneer in the Burgos sector working with old pre-phylloxera Tinto Fino and Albillo Mayor vines, producing low-intervention wines with minimal sulfur under the Villalbilla and other labels.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Cepa 21
vineyards.address: Carretera Renedo-Pesquera km 35, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: The Moro family's second estate, founded in 2001 at Pesquera de Duero, focused on younger-vine Tinto Fino with the Cepa 21 and Hito entry labels and the premium Malabrigo from selected old parcels.

vineyards.name: Dominio de Atauta
vineyards.address: Calle Real 21, 42312 Atauta, Soria, Spain
vineyards.description: Specialists in extreme-altitude old-vine Tinto Fino from the Soria sub-zone at Atauta, where pre-phylloxera ungrafted vines at over 1000 metres produce the Llanos del Almendro and single-parcel La Mala cuvées.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Carmelo Rodero
vineyards.address: Calle Las Escuelas 12, 09314 Pedrosa de Duero, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A Pedrosa de Duero family estate producing the Carmelo Rodero Crianza, Reserva and 9 Meses, as well as TSM from old vines, with the founding family still at the helm after more than three decades.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Valdubón
vineyards.address: Carretera N-122 km 297, 09318 Milagros, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A modern Burgos-sector estate at Milagros producing the Valdubón Crianza, Reserva and Élite from high-altitude Tinto Fino vineyards on limestone soils, with a distinctive cave-cellar under the winery.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Pérez Pascuas
vineyards.address: Pedrosa de Duero, 09314 Pedrosa de Duero, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate visits and wine tourism in Pedrosa de Duero.
vineyards.description: Three-brother estate at Pedrosa de Duero producing the Viña Pedrosa Crianza, Reserva and Gran Reserva, Finca La Navilla and the Pérez Pascuas Gran Reserva Gran Selección from estate Tinto Fino.

vineyards.name: Pago de los Capellanes
vineyards.address: Camino de los Fornos s/n, 09314 Pedrosa de Duero, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A Pedrosa de Duero estate (note: a producer name within DO Ribera del Duero, not a Pago appellation) producing Roble, Crianza, Reserva and the single-vineyard El Nogal and El Picón from estate Tinto Fino vines.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Tamaral
vineyards.address: Carretera N-122, km 310.5, 47315 Peñafiel, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A modern estate near Peñafiel crafting value-driven Tinto Fino wines in Crianza, Reserva and Finca la Meda styles, widely available at Spanish restaurants and a good introduction to the appellation.

vineyards.name: Comenge
vineyards.address: Camino del Castillo s/n, 47316 Curiel de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: An organic estate at Curiel de Duero producing Don Miguel Comenge, Familia Comenge and the Biberius entry range, plus an Albillo Mayor white and rosé from their castle-view vineyard overlooking the Duero.

verified.address_quoted: Camino del Castillo s/n, 47316 Curiel del Duero - Valladolid

vineyards.name: Bodegas Montebaco
vineyards.address: Finca Monte Alto, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: An estate between Pesquera de Duero and Valbuena de Duero converting a former dairy farm, with the Montebaco Crianza first released in 1994 from old Tempranillo clones and the premium Semele range.

verified.address_quoted: Finca Monte Alto, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid

vineyards.name: Bodega Matarromera
vineyards.address: Carretera Renedo-Pesquera km 30, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: Carlos Moro's estate at Valbuena de Duero producing Matarromera Crianza, Reserva and Gran Reserva alongside the Melior range, with vineyards between Olivares and Valbuena and a focus on balanced, elegant Tinto Fino.

vineyards.name: Matallana (Telmo Rodríguez)
vineyards.address: Quintanilla de Onésimo, 47350 Quintanilla de Onésimo, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: Telmo Rodríguez's Ribera del Duero project producing Matallana from old-vine Tinto Fino parcels in the Valladolid sector, applying his low-intervention philosophy shared across his Spanish estate portfolio.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Cillar de Silos
vineyards.address: Carretera de La Horra, 09370 Quintanamanvirgo, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A Burgos-sector estate at Quintanamanvirgo producing Cillar de Silos Roble, Crianza, Reserva and the prestige Torresilo single-vineyard from old-vine Tinto Fino, well regarded for consistency and quality-to-price ratio.

vineyards.name: Viñas del Jaro
vineyards.address: Ctra. Peñafiel-Valoria km 1, 47316 Peñafiel, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A Peñafiel area estate producing the Jaro and Pago de los Capellanes sibling ranges, known for well-structured Crianza and Reserva at accessible price points from the Valladolid sector.

vineyards.name: Resalte de Peñafiel
vineyards.address: Avenida de la Constitución 10, 47300 Peñafiel, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A Peñafiel estate producing the Resalte Gran Resalte, Crianza and Viña Resalte lines from estate Tinto Fino vineyards at the foot of Peñafiel castle, with a tasting room open to visitors.

vineyards.name: Vega Real
vineyards.address: Carretera N-122 km 321.5, 47350 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A well-regarded family estate at Valbuena de Duero producing the Vega Real Roble, Crianza, Reserva and prestige Pagos de Vega Real from limestone-rich vineyards beside the river.

vineyards.name: Convento San Francisco
vineyards.address: Calle Bodegas s/n, 09311 La Horra, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A La Horra estate occupying a former Franciscan convent, crafting single-vineyard Tinto Fino wines of depth from the high-altitude Burgos sector, with the historic stone cellar providing ideal natural temperature for ageing.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Briego
vineyards.address: Ctra. Roa-La Horra km 2, 09312 Roa de Duero, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A family estate near Roa de Duero on the Burgos plateau producing the Briego Crianza, Reserva, Fiel and single-parcel Infidel from Tinto Fino vines on chalky limestone clay soils.

vineyards.name: Bodegas y Viñedos Neo
vineyards.address: Camino Canalejas s/n, 09318 Castrillo de la Vega, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A Burgos-area estate at Castrillo de la Vega producing the Neo Punta Esencia, Compromiso and Prieto from old-vine Tinto Fino, with a reputation for concentrated, structured reds from the eastern Burgos sub-zone.

vineyards.name: Legaris
vineyards.address: Carretera Curiel-Peñafiel s/n, 47316 Curiel de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A Torres family estate at Curiel de Duero founded in 2000 producing the Legaris Crianza, Reserva and Premium from estate Tinto Fino, housed in a modern gravity-fed winery designed to minimise intervention.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Trus
vineyards.address: Carretera de Traspinedo s/n, 47012 Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: An estate near Valladolid producing the Trus Roble, Crianza, Reserva and the premium Trus 12 Meses from carefully selected Tinto Fino parcels on the western edge of the appellation.

vineyards.name: Hacienda Solano
vineyards.address: Carretera de Aranda km 3.5, 09318 Hontangas, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A Burgos-province estate near Hontangas producing the Hacienda Solano Crianza, Reserva and the Señorío de Solano range from parcels on the chalk-clay high plateau east of Aranda de Duero.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Vizcarra
vineyards.address: Carretera de Aranda km 1, 09314 Mambrilla de Castrejón, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: Juan Carlos Vizcarra's family estate at Mambrilla de Castrejón producing Vizcarra Roble, Crianza, Senda del Oro and the prestige Vizcarra 15 Meses from high-altitude Tinto Fino, respected for freshness and balance.

vineyards.name: Astrales
vineyards.address: Calle Las Eras s/n, 09317 La Aguilera, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A small La Aguilera estate focused on single-vineyard old-vine Tinto Fino, producing just two labels, Astrales and Christina (a second wine), with the winery respected by critics for its consistently elegant interpretation.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Reyes
vineyards.address: Carretera de Aranda s/n, 09314 Pedrosa de Duero, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A Pedrosa de Duero estate producing the Teófilo Reyes Crianza, Reserva and Gran Reserva from old-vine Tinto Fino, a historic bodega that influenced a generation of Ribera winemakers in the 1980s.

vineyards.name: Pradorey
vineyards.address: Carretera de Gumiel km 1, 09311 La Horra, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A La Horra estate producing the Pradorey Élite, Reserva and the Albillo Mayor white, with modern winemaking in a 21st-century gravity-flow cellar and a hotel for wine-tourism stays.

vineyards.name: Aalto PS (Pago San Vicente)
vineyards.address: Paraje Vallejo de Carril s/n, 47360 Quintanilla de Arriba, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: The single-vineyard Pago San Vicente expression produced under the Aalto label by Mariano García, sourced from a specific old-vine parcel in the Valladolid sector and vinified separately from the Aalto estate blend.

verified.address_quoted: Paraje Vallejo de Carril s/n, Quintanilla de Arriba, Valladolid 47360

vineyards.name: Bodegas Aster
vineyards.address: Ctra. Nacional 122 km 297, 09318 Anguix, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: The La Rioja Alta group's Ribera del Duero estate at Anguix, applying the same philosophy of long oak ageing from the Rioja parent to produce Aster Crianza, Reserva and the prestige Finca el Otero from estate Tinto Fino.

vineyards.name: Bodegas O Fournier
vineyards.address: Ctra. Olmedillo de Roa s/n, 09316 Berlangas de Roa, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: The Spanish arm of the Fournier family group at Berlangas de Roa, producing Urban Ribera, Alfa Spiga and the O Fournier prestige label from Tinto Fino and Garnacha in the Burgos sector.

vineyards.name: Convento de Oreja
vineyards.address: Calle Convento s/n, 47315 Peñafiel, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: An estate near Peñafiel producing Convento de Oreja Crianza, Reserva and Selección from Tinto Fino, named for the historic convent that once occupied the site and known for their accessible, well-balanced style.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Tarsus
vineyards.address: Carretera de Roa km 2, 09311 La Horra, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A La Horra estate producing the Tarsus Crianza, Reserva and the Quintus prestige label from high-altitude Tinto Fino vineyards in the Burgos sector, with consistent critical recognition for their structured, age-worthy style.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Vatan
vineyards.address: Carretera de Aranda s/n, 09311 La Horra, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A small La Horra producer crafting the Vatan Ribera del Duero from old-vine Tinto Fino parcels on calcareous clay soils in the Burgos province, with a reputation for extractive, age-worthy style at the premium tier.

vineyards.name: Hacienda Zorita
vineyards.address: Carretera Salamanca-Valladolid km 310.5, 37200 Ledesma, Salamanca, Spain
vineyards.description: An organic estate in Salamanca province outside the DO boundary classified as VT Castilla y León, producing the Hacienda Zorita Natural Reserve and Reserva from Tinto Fino and international varieties with a hotel and ecotourism complex.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Vizcarra Ramos
vineyards.address: Carretera Aranda-Roa km 6, 09316 Fuentelcésped, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A Fuentelcesped estate in the Burgos sector producing concentrated Tinto Fino wines in Crianza and Reserva styles from clay-limestone soils on the eastern plateau near Aranda de Duero.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Leda
vineyards.address: Camino de la Granja s/n, 47350 Quintanilla de Onésimo, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A Quintanilla de Onésimo project vinifying old-vine Tinto Fino sourced from across the plateau, classified as VT Castilla y León due to multi-province sourcing, producing the Leda and Mas de Leda from ungrafted centenarian vines.

vineyards.name: Rolland and Galarreta
vineyards.address: Camino de la Vid s/n, 09311 La Horra, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A La Horra project between Michel Rolland and Spanish partner Iñigo Galarreta producing a single Ribera del Duero from old-vine Tinto Fino parcels in the Burgos sector, advised by the celebrated Bordeaux consultant.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Mas Que Vinos
vineyards.address: Calle Cabeza Gorda s/n, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A biodynamic-practicing estate at Valbuena de Duero producing the Ercavio and Alma del Duero ranges from Tinto Fino and Albillo Mayor with a natural wine philosophy, minimal intervention and low added sulphur.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Roa
vineyards.address: Camino Real s/n, 09311 Roa de Duero, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: An estate anchored to the historic town of Roa de Duero, producing the Costera, Crianza and Sylis range from Tinto Fino on the limestone-chalk plateau above the Duero in Burgos province.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Condado de Haza
vineyards.address: Carretera N-122 km 325, 09318 La Horra, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: Alejandro Fernandez's second Ribera estate at La Horra, producing Condado de Haza Roble and Crianza alongside the premium Alenza Gran Reserva, sharing the same Tinto Fino philosophy as Tinto Pesquera.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Díez Llorente
vineyards.address: Camino de los Praos s/n, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A small family estate at Pesquera de Duero producing the Díez Llorente Crianza and Reserva from estate Tinto Fino, with a focus on terroir expression from the clay-limestone soils of the Valladolid valley floor.

vineyards.name: García Figuero
vineyards.address: Camino de las Viñas s/n, 09311 La Horra, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A La Horra family estate producing the García Figuero Roble, Crianza, Reserva, Tinto 15 Meses and the premium Único label from estate old-vine Tinto Fino, widely distributed and a reliable benchmark for the La Horra sub-zone.

vineyards.name: Alonso del Yerro
vineyards.address: Carretera N-122 km 325.5, 47359 Quintanilla de Onésimo, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A small estate at Quintanilla de Onésimo producing the Alonso del Yerro and María single-vineyard labels from old-vine Tinto Fino, with consulting input from Stéphane Derenoncourt, focused on freshness and precision.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Portia
vineyards.address: Carretera de Gumiel km 3, 09300 Gumiel de Izán, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A Gumiel de Izán estate notable for its Foster + Partners-designed star-shaped winery building, producing the Portia Prima, Ebeia and Triennia from Tinto Fino with a strong wine-tourism programme.
vineyards.tip: The Norman Foster-designed star winery is one of the most photographed wine buildings in Spain.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Emina
vineyards.address: Carretera de Valbuena km 5, 47315 Peñafiel, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: A large Peñafiel estate within the Matarromera group, producing the Emina Crianza, Reserva and single-vineyard Emina Atio, with a Centro de Interpretación Vitivinícola museum and hospitality complex on site.

vineyards.name: Finca Museum
vineyards.address: Carretera de Valbuena km 4, 47316 Peñafiel, Valladolid, Spain
vineyards.description: An estate near Peñafiel producing the Museum Real Crianza, Reserva and Gran Reserva alongside the Museum Collection range, with an underground cellar museum that gives the winery its name.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Ribera del Pelayo
vineyards.address: Calle Mayor s/n, 09312 Hoyales de Roa, Burgos, Spain
vineyards.description: A small Burgos-province estate in Hoyales de Roa producing single-vineyard Tinto Fino wines from old vines on the Roa de Duero plateau, known to local specialists for its terroir-driven, restrained style.
